text:
is an original character from Neon Genesis Evangelion SIDE STORY 2 ~ Feast of Dolls ~ visual novel game. She is a transfer student that moved in 2-A class. She always carries a teddy bear, which she believes the spirit "Sandy-san" lives inside it.

History

Neon Genesis Evangelion SIDE STORY 2 ~ Feast of Dolls ~

Trivia

Her character design is based on a contest winner sent idea.
The contest had the deadline of 20 January 2006.
The initial idea was that the new character would be a classmate of Rei, Asuka, and Shinji.
The contest winner would also choose their name, characteristics, personality, way of speaking. https://web.archive.org/web/20080221143544/http://www.gainax.co.jp/anime/eva/backnum2005.html 
Her blood type is O.
Her surname, , comes from the Japanese destroyer Matsukaze of the Japanese Imperial Navy.
